metadata.description: Name of the azd environment — used to derive a unique resource token.
Primary location for all resources.

Location for the Azure AI Services (Foundry) account. Pinned to a
region with reliable model capacity; can differ from the primary location.
Existing resource group to deploy into.
Object ID of the deploying user/principal (Entra SQL admin).
Display name / UPN of the deploying principal (Entra SQL admin).
Type of the deploying principal.
SQL database name.
Azure OpenAI deployment (model) name created on the AI account.
Azure OpenAI API version.
When "true", email-on-open notification settings are added to the app.

Optional explicit token used in resource names (e.g. a ddMMyyHHmmss
timestamp set by the deploy script). Must be short (<= 12 chars recommended)
and alphanumeric. When empty, a deterministic hash is used instead.
Local admin username for the SQL jump-box VM. Empty disables the VM.
Local admin password for the SQL jump-box VM. Empty disables the VM.
Source IP/CIDR allowed to RDP into the jump-box. Empty = no inbound RDP rule.

properties.description: Database connectivity errors detected in application telemetry (faster signal than the App Gateway backend-health alert).

allOf.query:
union
  (exceptions
    | where type has 'ConnectionError'
        or outerMessage has_any ('Deny Public Network Access', 'is not allowed', 'Login failed', 'AADSTS', 'ETIMEOUT', 'paused', 'resuming')
    | extend Detail = outerMessage),
  (dependencies
    | where type == 'SQL' and success == false
    | extend Detail = strcat(name, ' | ', resultCode))
| summarize Count = count() by Detail = tostring(Detail)

properties.description: Azure OpenAI / Foundry model connectivity errors detected in application telemetry. AI failures do not trip the DB-only readiness probe, so this is the only signal for an AI outage.

allOf.query:
union
  (dependencies
    | where type == 'GenAI'
        or (type in ('HTTP', 'Http') and target has_any ('cognitiveservices.azure.com', 'openai.azure.com', 'services.ai.azure.com'))
    | where success == false
    | extend Detail = strcat(coalesce(target, name), ' | ', tostring(resultCode))),
  (exceptions
    | where outerMessage has_any ('cognitiveservices.azure.com', 'openai.azure.com', 'services.ai.azure.com', 'DeploymentNotFound', 'content_filter', 'Rate limit', '429', 'invalid_api_key', 'PermissionDenied')
    | extend Detail = outerMessage)
| summarize Count = count() by Detail = tostring(Detail)

metadata.description: Source IP/CIDR allowed to RDP into the SQL jump-box VM. Empty = no inbound RDP rule (use Bastion/VPN).
Name of the model deployment the app uses (AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT).
Underlying model to deploy.
Model version.
Deployment SKU name (GlobalStandard recommended for broad availability).
Deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute.
Object ID of the Entra principal set as SQL admin.
Display name / UPN of the Entra principal set as SQL admin.
Resource ID of the action group that receives the SQL CPU alert.

properties.description: Azure SQL database CPU at or above 85%. Used by the SRE Agent to detect and remediate CPU saturation.
Azure SQL database worker usage elevated by a severe blocking tree (30+ sessions blocked behind head blockers). Used by the SRE Agent to detect and remediate blocking.

metadata.description: Subscription ID — used by the SRE chaos demo (management plane).
Resource group name — used by the SRE chaos demo (management plane).
SQL logical server short name — used by the SRE chaos demo.
Azure AI Services account short name — used by the SRE chaos demo.
Key Vault name backing the EMAIL_APP_PASSWORD reference.
When "true", email-on-open settings are added to the app.

variables.emailAppSettings: [if(variables('emailOn'), createArray(createObject('name', 'EMAIL_HOST', 'value', parameters('emailHost')), createObject('name', 'EMAIL_PORT', 'value', parameters('emailPort')), createObject('name', 'EMAIL_USER', 'value', parameters('emailUser')), createObject('name', 'EMAIL_FROM', 'value', if(empty(parameters('emailFrom')), parameters('emailUser'), parameters('emailFrom'))), createObject('name', 'EMAIL_TO', 'value', if(empty(parameters('emailTo')), parameters('emailUser'), parameters('emailTo'))), createObject('name', 'EMAIL_THROTTLE_MINUTES', 'value', parameters('emailThrottleMinutes')), createObject('name', 'EMAIL_APP_PASSWORD', 'value', format('@Microsoft.KeyVault(VaultName={0};SecretName={1})', parameters('keyVaultName'), parameters('emailPasswordSecretName')))), createArray())]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'ENABLE_ORYX_BUILD', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_CONTAINER_START_TIME_LIMIT', 'value', '600'), createObject('name', 'NODE_ENV', 'value', 'production'), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'ApplicationInsightsAgent_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'value', '~3'), createObject('name', 'XDT_MicrosoftApplicationInsights_Mode', 'value', 'recommended'), createObject('name', 'DB_BACKEND', 'value', 'azure-sql'), createObject('name', 'DATA_MODE', 'value', 'live'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SQL_SERVER', 'value', parameters('sqlServerFqdn')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SQL_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('sqlDatabaseName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('aiEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('aiDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION', 'value', parameters('aiApiVersion')), createObject('name', 'AI_READ_PDF', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'FILING_MAX_REPORTING_LAG_DAYS', 'value', '90'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID', 'value', parameters('subscriptionId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_RESOURCE_GROUP', 'value', parameters('resourceGroupName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SQL_SERVER_NAME', 'value', parameters('sqlServerName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('aiAccountName')), createObject('name', 'CHAOS_CPU_SECONDS', 'value', '0'), createObject('name', 'CHAOS_CPU_PARALLELISM', 'value', '4'), createObject('name', 'CHAOS_CPU_ITERATIONS', 'value', '50'), createObject('name', 'CHAOS_ORDERS_ROWS', 'value', '2000000')), variables('emailAppSettings'))]

settings.commandToExecute: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $d='C:\sqlsetup'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://aka.ms/ssms/22/release/vs_SSMS.exe' -OutFile $d\ssms.exe; Start-Process $d\ssms.exe -ArgumentList '--quiet --norestart' -Wait"

metadata.description: Principal (object) ID of the App Service managed identity.
Backend App Service default host name (app-xxxx.azurewebsites.net).

properties.description: Application Gateway has one or more unhealthy backend hosts.
